title: Kuaishou shares jump after Tencent joins $2.8 billion raise for Kling AI subsidiary
summary_full: Kuaishou shares rose as much as 6.89% at Friday's Hong Kong market open before paring gains to trade around 0.75% higher.
summary_public: Kuaishou shares rose as much as 6.89% at Friday's Hong Kong market open before paring gains to trade around 0.75% higher.
